news.title: Morning Assembly
news.description: Morning assembly will begin at 8:30 AM in the main ground. Students should assemble five minutes early.

news.title: Science Exhibition
news.description: Students from Classes 6 to 10 will present innovative science models in the auditorium.

news.title: Sports Practice
news.description: Football, basketball and athletics practice will be held after school from 4:00 PM.

announcements.title: PTM
announcements.text: Parent-Teacher Meeting will be held on Saturday in the school auditorium.

announcements.title: Library
announcements.text: Students are requested to return all overdue library books before Friday.

ticker: Welcome to the School Digital News Board
